Cobalt Breastplate  
 

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 45
STR: +12 DEX: +12 STA: +12 HP: +50
Effect: Invigorate (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 15.0) at Level 45
WT: 20.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR
Race: ALL except IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 45
STR: +12 DEX: +12 STA: +12 HP: +50

WT: 20.0 Size: LARGE

Appearance:Plate
Tint:

Stackable:No

Tribute:15000

IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 03:06:34
Page Updated:Tue Apr 23rd, 2024

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 25,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 55

WOE IS ME
QuoteReply
# Dec 07 2006 at 11:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592303186008
44 posts
.........
wow... why...
i mean i know about the lore and all..but still....
Why can Iksar not sue this?? its a Warror only item, but Iksars cant use it..it makes no sense...

I know that Ikkys cant wear place cause it messes with their scales, ect. ect. But the new plate they can use..

Why wont they change it so warriors of the lizard men can use this fine piece of equipment??

I baugt one..then relized ikkys couldnt use it..i got it for 10K..now on my merchant for 30K....

WOE IS ME
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2007 at 10:27 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593968139116
Scholar
73 posts
Sadly Iksar cannot wear any Original or Kunark plate. Velious and beyond they can however. Get the Thurgadin BP, same clicky half a second faster casting Iksar usable.

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 07 2003 at 6:51 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I bought this bp and barbed dragonscale pauldrons (value 4-5k) on Ayonae Ro for 23k. Was a pretty nice deal and heal is nice. Also looks really cool, i might buy the greaves as well when i save up enough.
RE: Got it and Pauldrons for 23k
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2003 at 8:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255805958
View User Forum
56 posts
Just picked this up for my Warrior on the Lanys Server for 15k. I couldnt believe my eyes!! Better believe I scooped it up. Made a nice replacement for my Engraved Royal Velium. Usually sells for 40k and up on Lanys. Too bad he'll have to wait to use the clicky.

#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 31 2003 at 9:15 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) BotS
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 19 2003 at 6:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) first, this doesn't click till 45 ... second, for 1/3 the price (roughly 15k for fine heraldic vs 40-50k for cobalt), you can get a better BP (if your server is stupid screwy, i pity you . . look up the recipie and pay for the combine, don't pay 70k like a jackazs)

This BP is a steal for 70k on any server. I saw one for sale on Prexus lastnight for 70k. If anyone sees it for that price, BUY IT. best BP that is not nodrop.

QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2005 at 11:09 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592260262682
285 posts
just remember this also, 30k then could get u a fungi.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 08 2003 at 6:18 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ur a idot , It sint 70k its like only 55, and its not the best
RE: haha
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2003 at 6:54 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Read the date of his post, April 2002. 9 months ago. When he posted that, 70k was in fact, a very decent price for a cobalt BP, and many of the better droppable BPs were not yet released. Keep in mind that PoP was not out, and Luclin had only been out for 4 months.

At the time, for most guilds, the velious quest armors were the best gear that most could get. Of course all that stuff is no drop, and even today, Plate BP MQ's are very expensive, and hard to find.

Out of the tradeable gear, this was pretty close to as good as you could get.

BTW, when calling someone an idiot, it usually helps if you spell it correctly.
